/run-test.description: Trigger a set of security + lightweight load tests for a single endpoint.

body.baseUrl: string (required) - full base URL, http(s) scheme
body.path: string (required) - endpoint path including path params (e.g. /pet/{id})
body.endpointContext: object (optional) - metadata extracted from OpenAPI (query params, pathParamValues, bodyTemplate, formDataParams)

body.report: object - generated report (title, generatedAt, endpoint, summary, performance, findings)

notes: Backend validates and sanitizes incoming fields: baseUrl must be http/https and reasonable length.
endpointContext is sanitized; large or deeply nested templates are truncated for safety.
The backend sends generated payloads to the target service — the target service may still reflect payloads in responses.
